from docx import Document
from docx.shared import Inches, Cm, Pt, Emu
from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH

doc = Document("CFO_Briefing_NSW_Drought_Fund.docx")

# Margins

print("=== SECTION ===")
print(f"  Page width:  {sec.page_width}  ({sec.page_width / 914400:.2f} in)")
print(f"  Page height: {sec.page_height} ({sec.page_height / 914400:.2f} in)")
print(f"  Left margin: {sec.left_margin}  ({sec.left_margin / 914400:.2f} in)")
print(f"  Right margin:{sec.right_margin}  ({sec.right_margin / 914400:.2f} in)")
print(f"  Top margin:  {sec.top_margin}  ({sec.top_margin / 914400:.2f} in)")
print(f"  Bot margin:  {sec.bottom_margin}  ({sec.bottom_margin / 914400:.2f} in)")
print(f"  Orientation: {sec.orientation}")

print("\n=== BODY ELEMENTS (paragraphs + tables interleaved) ===")
for i, elem in enumerate(doc.element.body):
    tag = elem.tag.split('}')[-1]
    if tag == 'p':

                print(f"       text='{txt}'")
                break
    elif tag == 'tbl':
        for t_idx, tbl in enumerate(doc.tables):
            if tbl._element is elem:

                print(f"  [{i}] TABLE {t_idx}: {rows} rows ×

text: Now let me get the complete text content for every paragraph:

content:
--- [0] Heading 1 ---
CFO Briefing — NSW Drought Fund: Initial Portfolio Recommendation

--- [1] Heading 2 ---
Section 1: Recommendations

--- [2] Normal ---
Under a disinflationary base case (Australian CPI 2.7%, RBA easing 75–100 bps over 2026–27), we recommend 18% STI / 22% MTG / 60% LTG — tilting toward long-term growth to maximise real returns over the Fund's 10-year horizon. The optimised portfolio delivers a forecast 4.86% p.a. net return at 7.71% risk (Table 3).

--- [3] Heading 2 ---
Section 2: Key Implications

--- [4] List Bullet ---
Return vs hurdle: The 4.86% net return falls 34 bps short of the CPI + 2.5% hurdle (5.2%) under CMA v2 building-block assumptions. This reflects deliberately conservative equity forecasts (5.4–8.2% vs 9.8–11.5% historical; Table 1). Any equity outperformance relative to CMA v2 clears the hurdle; the 60% LTG tilt maximises that probability over the Fund's intergenerational investment horizon (RBA, 2026).

--- [5] List Bullet ---
Liquidity: STI (18%) exceeds the 10%-within-12-months requirement; STI plus MTG (40%) exceeds the 25%-within-3-years threshold. Both mandates are satisfied with margin.

--- [6] List Bullet ---
Risk appetite: Portfolio risk of 7.71% sits within the Board's moderate-high tolerance. STI anchors near-term volatility at 0.90%; LTG's 10-year horizon absorbs short-term drawdowns (Table 2).

--- [7] Heading 2 ---
Section 3: Key Findings

--- [8] Heading 3 ---
A. Macro Regime

--- [9] List Bullet ---
Australia: CPI at 2.7% sits within the RBA's 2–3% target band. The anticipated easing cycle compresses bond yields — generating fixed-income capital gains — and reduces corporate borrowing costs, supporting equity valuations (RBA, 2026).

--- [10] List Bullet ---
Global: US CPI at 2.3%; IMF projects global growth at 3.3% (IMF, 2026). AUD depreciation of ~5% YTD boosts unhedged global equity and infrastructure returns for AUD-based investors.

--- [11] Heading 3 ---
B. Asset Class Outlook (NSWDF CMA v2, Building-Bl

"""Convert CFO_Briefing_NSW_Drought_Fund.docx -> cfo_brief.pdf (exactly 2 pages)."""

from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import A4
from reportlab.lib.units import cm, mm
from reportlab.lib.colors import HexColor, white, black
from reportlab.lib.styles import ParagraphStyle
from reportlab.lib.enums import TA_LEFT, TA_CENTER, TA_JUSTIFY
from reportlab.platypus import (
    SimpleDocTemplate, Paragraph, Spacer, Table, TableStyle,
    PageBreak, KeepTogether
)
from reportlab.platypus.flowables import HRFlowable
from reportlab.lib import colors
from PyPDF2 import PdfReader

# ── Colours ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
NAVY       = HexColor("#1F3864")
DARK_BLUE  = HexColor("#2E4A7A")
MED_BLUE   = HexColor("#2F5496")
GREY       = HexColor("#595959")
LIGHT_GREY = HexColor("#F2F2F2")
ALT_ROW    = HexColor("#E8EDF4")
WHITE      = white

# ── Page setup ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PAGE_W, PAGE_H = A4                  # 595.28 × 841.89 pt
MARGIN = 2.54 * cm                   # 1 inch = 2.54 cm ≈ 72 pt
CONTENT_W = PAGE_W - 2 * MARGIN      # usable width

OUTPUT = "cfo_brief.pdf"

# ── Styles ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
sH1 = ParagraphStyle(
    "H1", fontName="Helvetica-Bold", fontSize=14, leading=17,
    textColor=NAVY, spaceAfter=6, spaceBefore=0,
)
sH2 = ParagraphStyle(

)
sH3 = ParagraphStyle(
    "H3", fontName="Helvetica-Bold", fontSize=10, leading=12,
    textColor=MED_BLUE, spaceAfter=2, spaceBefore=4,
)
sBody = ParagraphStyle(
    "Body", fontName="Helvetica", fontSize=9.5, leading=11.5,
    textColor=black, spaceAfter=4, spaceBefore=0, alignment=TA_JUSTIFY,
)
